public_regression.purpose: PR regression check for deterministic time_to_merge median across the merged/open/draft/closed_without_merge status enum.

private_holdout.purpose: Expectation leakage is forbidden; Sprint 11 / 12 adds encrypted holdout cases outside this repository.

adversarial_new.purpose: Monthly append-only adversarial refresh for causality bypass, all-zero-duration, and >50% closed_without_merge attacks (plan v2 §2.2 / §7.10).

kpi_specific: time_to_merge is recomputed from input.sample_pull_requests, not copied from expected_aggregate
only PRs with status=merged contribute to the median
open, draft, closed_without_merge are excluded from numerator (no opinion)
merged_at >= ticket_created_at causality invariant rejected at parse time (no max(0,...) clamping)
corpus-wide uniqueness key is (ticket_id, repository_id) so one ticket may have multiple repos (Draft re-open / squash)
mock-only contract: aggregator does not pull from live tickets table (SP-012 wire-up)
fixture_id and dataset_version_id are persisted to EvalResult
